description: S83 mute conversation (recvOpt setting half, hermetic): drive l3_set_c2c_recv_opt on the seeded echo-peer conversation and prove recvOpt round-trips through l3_dump_state.conversations[].recvOpt (0=receive -> 2=block/mute -> 0). recvOpt 2 is the exact field _shouldSuppress reads to suppress notifications. The first step waits for the conversation list to hydrate; ends restored to 0 so the fixture self-cleans. Hermetic — no echo round-trip; the OS-banner-absence half stays the two-process run_fixture_c_mute.sh. Maps to S83 (setting half).
